nasb.text: Now the people of Beth-shemesh were reaping their wheat harvest in the valley, and they raised their eyes and saw the ark and were glad to see it.

esv.text: Now the people of Beth-shemesh were reaping their wheat harvest in the valley. And when they lifted up their eyes and saw the ark, they rejoiced to see it.

cnv.text: 那時，伯．示麥人正在谷中收割麥子，他們舉目觀看，看見了約櫃，就歡歡喜喜迎見約櫃。

ccb.text: 当时，伯·示麦人正在山谷里收割麦子。他们抬头看见约柜，非常高兴。
